calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR ORDER TO SEAL RE: PETITION TO CHANGE NAME AND GENDER
Off Calendar Jul-07-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
This matter comes on calendar for Motion to seal re: Petition to change name and gender.

Dept. 505; Judge Dekreon; Clerk: R. Sahatjian; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 02:11:23 p.m.. and concluding at 02:14:01

Atty. James C. Ward, esq appearing by Zoom for Michael James Oryall who is also appearing by Zoom.

Michal James Oryall was placed under oath and testified.

After reviewing the petition, the Court Grants the name change. After reviewing the request to seal portion of the petition the Court grants that too. Counsel will deliver a copy of the Petition to the Court with the requested redated potions on Monday July 10, 2023.
Orders signed in Court.

The Court Clerk will email a copy of the order and leave a copy downstairs for the Petition (D505)
